name: viral-replica
purpose: Route and operate the viral-replica-loop queue through one gated stage at a time.
output_contract: One selected job advances at most one stage per runner decision.
Every stage reads the linked worker and gate before recording PASS, FAIL, or STOP.
Self-audit mode runs maker output through the independent checker before gate recording.
Paid or batch generation stops until an explicit approval scope is present.
Stop and handoff responses include concrete inspection paths.
exclusions: Does not replace the video-replication craft skill.
Does not directly submit paid Seedance generation without the cost gate.
Does not accept source frames, contact sheets, or unsaved image directions as final visual assets.
rollback_boundary: Skill or runner governance changes may be reverted without deleting output/<job-id>/ artifacts, logs/loop_events.jsonl, or current user-approved handoff assets.
